projects.name: sample
projects.required_skills: Data Preprocessing; Docker; FastAPI; Feature Engineering; Git; Machine Learning; MongoDB; NumPy; Pandas; Power BI; Python; SQL; Scikit-Learn; TensorFlow; Azure; Data Science; Model Training
projects.description:
Sample Project Requirement
Project Information
Project Description
Develop an AI-powered recommendation system that suggests products to customers based on their purchase history, browsing behavior, and preferences. The solution should include data preprocessing, model training, API integration, and deployment.
Required Skills
Python 
Machine Learning 
Pandas 
NumPy 
Scikit-learn 
SQL 
FastAPI 
Git 
Data Preprocessing 
Feature Engineering 
Preferred Skills
XGBoost 
TensorFlow 
Docker 
MongoDB 
Power BI 
Minimum Experience
2 Years
Required Role
Data Scientist
Education
Bachelor's Degree in
Computer Science 
Information Technology 
Data Science 
Required Certifications
Google Data Analytics 
Microsoft Azure AI Fundamentals 
IBM Data Science Professional Certificate 
Required Skill Level
Project Responsibilities
Build ML models 
Clean and preprocess datasets 
Perform feature engineering 
Train and evaluate models 
Deploy APIs 
Write technical documentation 
Collaborate with backend developers.

Introduction 1.1. Purpose The purpose of this document is to present a detailed description of the Web Publishing System XE Web Publishing System It will explain the purpose and features of the system, the interfaces of the system, what the system will do, the constraints under which it must operate and how the system will react to external stimuli. This document is intended for both the stakeholders and the developers of the system and will be proposed to the Regional Historical Society XE Historical Society for its approval. 1.2. Scope of Project This software system will be a Web Publishing System XE for a local editor XE of a regional historical society. This system will be designed to maximize the editor s productivity by providing tools to assist in automating the article XE review XE and publishing process, which would otherwise have to be performed manually. By maximizing the editor s work efficiency and production the system will meet the editor s needs while remaining easy to understand and use. More specifically, this system is designed to allow an editor XE to manage and communicate with a group of reviewers XE and authors XE to publish articles XE to a public website. The software will facilitate communication between authors, reviewers, an

projects.name: talentBeacon
projects.required_skills: AWS; Flask; MySQL; Python; CSS; Data Science; Data Visualization; Docker; Excel; HTML; Java; JavaScript; Machine Learning; NumPy; Pandas; Power BI; React; SQL; Scikit-Learn; Statistics; Tableau
projects.description:
Software  Requirements  Specification  
(SRS)
 
Project  Title  
TalentBeacon™  –  Employee  Recommendation  &  Skill  Intelligence  Platform  
Version  
1.0  
Project  Domain  
Data  Science  /  Data  Analytics  
Project  Duration  
12–16  Weeks  
Team  Size  
6–10  Interns  
 
1.  Introduction  
1.1  Purpose  
TalentBeacon™  is  an  AI-powered  Employee  Recommendation  and  Skill  Intelligence  Platform  
designed
 
to
 
identify
 
the
 
most
 
suitable
 
employees
 
for
 
specific
 
job
 
roles,
 
projects,
 
tasks,
 
and
 
career
 
opportunities
 
within
 
an
 
organization.
 
The  platform  analyzes  employee  skills,  assessments,  certifications,  learning  history,  project  
experience,
 
and
 
performance
 
metrics
 
to:
 
●  Recommend  the  best-fit  employees  for  a  role  ●  Identify  employees  closest  to  a  target  role  ●  Calculate  skill  gaps  ●  Recommend  courses  and  learning  paths  ●  Predict  readiness  for  promotions  and  assignments  ●  Support  workforce  planning  and  talent  mobility  
 
1.2  Problem  Statement  
Organizations  often  face  challenges  such  as:  
●  Difficulty  identifying  the  right  employee  for  a  project  ●  Limited  visibility  into  employee  skills  ●  Lack  of  structured  career  progression  ●  Inability  to  identify  skill  gaps  ●  Manual  talent  allocation  processes  ●  Poor  workforce  utilization  
Managers  frequently  rely  on  personal  knowledge  instead  of  data-driven  recommendations.  
TalentBeacon™  solves  these  challenges  through  intelligent  workforce  analytics  and  
recommendation
 
algorithms.
 
 
1.3  Objectives  
●  Identify  best-fit  employees  for  job  roles  ●  Recommend  internal  candidates  for  projects  ●  Measure  employee-role  similarity  ●  Detect  skill  gaps  ●  Recommend  personalized  learning  paths  ●  Improve  workforce  utilization  ●  Support  employee  career  growth  ●  Enable  data-driven  talent  decisions  
 
2.  Scope  
The  platform  shall  provide:  
●  Employee  Skill  Repository  ●  Role  Intelligence  Engine  ●  Employee  Recommendation  Engine  ●  Skill  Gap  Analysis  ●  Learning  Recommendation  System  ●  Career  Progression  Analytics  ●  Workforce  Readiness  Analytics  ●  Employee  Ranking  Dashboard  
The  platform  is  intended  for  internal  workforce  development  and  talent  management.  
 
3.  User  Roles  
Administrator  
Responsibilities:  
●  Manage  platform  settings  ●  Manage  skills  catalog  ●  Manage  learning  resources  ●  View  organization-wide  analytics  
 
Manager  
Responsibilities:  
●  Search  employees  for  projects  ●  View  recommendations  ●  Analyze  team  skill  gaps  ●  Review  employee  readiness  
 
Employee  
Responsibilities:  
●  View  skill  profile  ●  View  career  recommendations  ●  Access  learning  suggestions  ●  Track  role  readiness  
 
4.  Functional  Requirements  
Module  1:  Authentication  &  Authorization  
Features:  
●  Login  ●  Logout  ●  Password  Reset  ●  Role-Based  Access  
Roles:  
●  Admin  ●  Manager  ●  Employee  
 
Module  2:  Employee  Skill  Profile  
Store  employee  information:  
Personal  Information  
●  Employee  ID  ●  Name  ●  Department  ●  Designation  
Professional  Information  
●  Skills  ●  Certifications  ●  Learning  Modules  Completed  ●  Assessments  Completed  ●  Project  Experience  ●  Performance  Ratings  
 
Module  3:  Skills  Repository  
Maintain  master  skill  database.  
Examples:  
Technical  Skills  
●  Python  ●  Java  ●  React  ●  AWS  ●  Docker  ●  SQL  
Analytics  Skills  
●  Power  BI  ●  Tableau  ●  Statistics  ●  Excel  
Soft  Skills  
●  Communication  ●  Leadership  ●  Presentation  
 
Module  4:  Role  Intelligence  Database  
Store  target  job  roles.  
Examples:  
●  Full  Stack  Developer  ●  Data  Analyst  ●  Data  Scientist  ●  Cloud  Engineer  ●  Cybersecurity  Analyst  ●  Machine  Learning  Engineer  
 
Role  Profile  Structure  
Each  role  contains:  
Required  Skills  
Example:  
Data  Analyst  
●  SQL  ●  Excel  ●  Power  BI  ●  Statistics  ●  Python  
 
Desired  Skills  
●  Machine  Learning  ●  Tableau  ●  Data  Visualization  
 
Minimum  Skill  Levels  
Beginner  
Intermediate  
Advanced  
Expert  
 
Module  5:  Employee  Matching  Engine  
Purpose:  
Identify  employees  closest  to  a  target  role.  
 
Matching  Parameters  
Analyze:  
●  Skills  ●  Certifications  ●  Assessments  ●  Learning  History  ●  Projects  ●  Experience  
 
Match  Score  
Generate:  
Employee  Match  Score   0%  -  100%   
Example:  
Data  Analyst  Role  
Employee  A  =  92%  
Employee  B  =  81%  
Employee  C  =  68%  
 
Ranking  
Display:  
Top  10  Recommended  Employees  
 
Module  6:  Skill  Gap  Analysis  
Compare:  
Employee  Skills  
vs  
Target  Role  Skills  
 
Example  
Target  Role:  
Data  Scientist  
Required:  
●  Python  ●  Statistics  ●  Machine  Learning  ●  SQL  
Employee  Skills:  
●  Python  ●  SQL  
Gap:  
●  Statistics  ●  Machine  Learning
